chapters.title: Moving Day
chapters.content: A moving truck stopped in front of Liam’s building. Boxes, plants, and furniture were carried upstairs all morning.

chapters.title: First Hello
chapters.content: In the elevator, Liam met his new neighbor, Sofia. She smiled and introduced herself while holding a box of books.

chapters.title: Unexpected Friendship
chapters.content: A few days later, they met again at the local café. What started as a simple hello slowly became a new friendship.
